text:
On Tue, Jul 25, 2000 at 07:49:46AM -0700, shirota@mbox.media.nagoya-u.ac.jp wrote:
> >Synopsis:       Update ports with LIB_DEPENDS from png.3 to png.4
> 19c19
> < LIB_DEPENDS=	png.3:${PORTSDIR}/graphics/png
> ---
> > LIB_DEPENDS=	png.4:${PORTSDIR}/graphics/png

Hmm.. what port might you be talking about?  All of the ones that work
have png.4.. although I admit there might be some broken ports still at
png.3.  Hmm...
